summary: Completed testing of Professional Registration form, Browse All Professionals page, and Master Admin approval workflow. Fixed 2 critical bugs: 1) Route ordering bug in backend causing Browse All API to fail, 2) SelectItem empty value error in BrowseAllProfessionals.jsx. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend UI testing confirmed all features working.

2. GET /api/matchmaker/cities returns 24 Indian cities - PASS
3. GET /api/matchmaker/expertise-tags returns 16 expertise tags - PASS
4. GET /api/matchmaker/professionals/all returns professionals list (after route fix) - PASS
5. Browse All with category filter works correctly - PASS
6. Browse All with city filter works correctly - PASS
7. Browse All pagination works correctly - PASS
8. GET /api/matchmaker/statistics returns stats - PASS
9. GET /api/admin/master-profile returns master admin info for ronraj2312@gmail.com - PASS
10. GET /api/admin/registration-stats returns pending/approved/rejected counts - PASS
11. GET /api/admin/pending-registrations returns pending list - PASS
12. Non-admin users get 403 when accessing pending registrations - PASS
13. GET /api/matchmaker/professionals search works - PASS
14. Search with experience filter works - PASS
15. Search with verified_only filter works - PASS
16. Professional Registration Step 1 (Basic Info) → Step 2 (Registration) Next button works - PASS
17. Professional Registration Step 2 → Step 3 (Expertise) Next button works - PASS
18. Professional Registration Step 3 → Step 4 (Documents) Next button works with RTA category - PASS
19. Browse All Professionals page loads correctly after SelectItem fix - PASS
20. Admin Center Operations tab shows pending registrations with approve/reject/re-apply buttons - PASS
21. POST /api/admin/registrations/{id}/action approve action works - PASS
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed route ordering: moved /matchmaker/professionals/all BEFORE /{professional_id} to prevent route conflict
/app/frontend/src/pages/BrowseAllProfessionals.jsx - Fixed SelectItem empty value error by using 'all' value instead of empty string
test_credentials: Session created via mongosh for test-user-* and master-admin-* (cleaned up after testing)
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing demo data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Professional Registration form is fully functional across all 5 steps. Browse All Professionals page now works after route fix. Master Admin approval workflow tested with ronraj2312@gmail.com. Key test IDs: category-select, name-input, email-input, mobile-input, next-step-btn, experience-input, terms-checkbox, submit-registration-btn. RTA category requires sebi_registration and pan_entity fields.

bugs_fixed.root_cause: Route ordering bug - /{professional_id} route was defined before /all route, causing FastAPI to match 'all' as a professional_id
bugs_fixed.fix: Moved /matchmaker/professionals/all route definition BEFORE /{professional_id} route (line 887 before line 927)

bugs_fixed.issue: Uncaught runtime error: A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string
bugs_fixed.root_cause: SelectItem components for category and city filters had value='' which is not allowed in shadcn/ui Select
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed empty string values to 'all' and added transformation in onValueChange to convert 'all' back to empty string for filtering

step_1_basic_info.description: Category selection (including RTA), name, email, mobile fields

step_2_registration_numbers.description: Category-specific registration fields (SEBI, PAN for RTA)

step_3_expertise.description: Service locations, years of experience, expertise tags selection

step_4_documents.description: PAN, Aadhaar, Registration certificate uploads with expiry date

step_5_review.description: Review all info, consent checkboxes, submit

next_button.description: Next button works across all steps with proper validation

toast_notifications.description: Toast notifications appear when validation fails

page_load.description: Page loads correctly showing all professionals

search.description: Search by name, firm, or expertise

operations_tab.description: Shows master admin profile and registration stats

pending_registrations.description: Table showing pending registrations with actions

approve_action.description: Approve registration changes status to active

reject_action.status: NOT TESTED (no pending registrations after approve test)

reapply_action.status: NOT TESTED (no pending registrations after approve test)

browse_all_api_failure.investigation: Checked route definitions in server.py using grep
browse_all_api_failure.root_cause: FastAPI matches routes in order of definition. The /{professional_id} route (line 886) was defined before /all route (line 1086), so 'all' was being matched as a professional_id parameter
browse_all_api_failure.verification: API now returns correct professionals list

browse_all_page_crash.symptom: Page crashed with 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string'
browse_all_page_crash.root_cause: shadcn/ui Select component does not allow empty string as value for SelectItem
browse_all_page_crash.fix: Changed value='' to value='all' and added transformation in onValueChange
